changelog: Fixes Desktop member/sidebar freshness: member list stores channel-access IDs only and renders live users, new joins/status updates show without restart, Online role groups sort before Offline groups, server-settings user role edits sync into the live cache, and right-click user role menus resolve fresh live roles before showing/toggling roles.
notes: Fixes Desktop member/sidebar freshness: member list stores channel-access IDs only and renders live users, new joins/status updates show without restart, Online role groups sort before Offline groups, server-settings user role edits sync into the live cache, and right-click user role menus resolve fresh live roles before showing/toggling roles.
